name: Satisfactory
author: ops@refx.example
description: Coffee Stain's first-person factory-building sim. SteamCMD-installed dedicated server managed in-game via the server manager UI.
startupDetect: Server is ready|Game state updated to Running

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
cd /mnt/server
BRANCH_ARGS=""
if [ "${EXPERIMENTAL}" = "true" ]; then BRANCH_ARGS="-beta experimental"; fi
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 1690800 ${BRANCH_ARGS} validate +quit
chmod +x FactoryServer.sh || true
echo 'Satisfactory install complete.'

variables.description: Maximum concurrent players (officially supported up to 4, higher is unsupported).
UDP port used for server discovery and the management API handshake.
UDP beacon port used for client connection negotiation.
Install the Experimental build instead of Early Access (stable).
Optional administrator password used when claiming the server in the manager UI.

longDescription: Build sprawling automated factories with friends on a dedicated Satisfactory server.
